title: Tracking-system import and takeover of legacy methods

acceptance_criteria.text: import-plan maps a tracking/ governance system to the right record types: decisions.md -> decisions/, risks.md -> audits/findings/ (numeric id, RISK-NNN preserved in source), milestones.md -> work/ items; status.md/work-log.md are not fabricated. Non-destructive, idempotent, regression-tested.

`repopact takeover` retires a legacy plan dir (archive by default, --delete optional) only when the repo validates and every item is migrated (source provenance); refuses un-migrated dirs and reports mixed-content sources for review. Regression-tested.
Proven on real SkillForge: tracking/ imported (3 decisions, 5 findings, 6 milestones); todos/ archived to archive/todos/; repository validates and doctor is healthy.
